newJobs.title: [TECHNICAL] Chinese (Simplified) Translator
newJobs.jd: Native-level proficiency in Chinese (Simplified). Fluent knowledge in either: French, Russian, German or Arabic. Degree in Translation. At least 5 years of translation experience in technical fields (Automotive, Manufacturing, IT). Familiarity with CAT tools. Benefits: Diversified projects for world-class customers, cutting-edge localization tools, international team.

newJobs.title: BD Manager 业务拓展经理
newJobs.jd: Minimum 3-5 years' sales experience in gaming industry. Excellent Chinese and English communication skills. Customer-oriented skill. Knowledge of game dev, game art, localization, player support, testing preferred. Responsibilities: Sell Keywords Service offerings, maintain client relationships, visit clients, represent Keywords at conferences, develop business network.

notes: 本次搜索发现2个潜在新职位。Lionbridge (本地化Top) 招聘简体中文技术译者（自由职业），需要5年以上技术翻译经验。Keywords Studios 招聘业务拓展经理（BD Manager），需要3-5年游戏行业销售经验。对比上次结果(5个)，新增主要是Lionbridge和Keywords Studios的BD职位。
